occupation: Media Sustainability Project Director at Ad Net Zero
headline: Advertising Strategy | Building a Clean Media Future | Restoring Climate and Nature through Material Impact
summary: I have over 11 years experience in media and communications, with five years specifically…

experiences.title: Media Sustainability Project Director
experiences.description: In March 2025 I was promoted to Media Sustainability Director. In this new role my main responsibilities were in developing a Global Media Sustainability Framework for the advertising industry, that can be used by any organisation to estimate the emissions produced by different advertising formats, more accurately.

experiences.title: Global Project Manager
experiences.description: In November 2020, The Advertising Association launched Ad Net Zero, an industry-wide initiative to help UK advertising respond to the climate crisis caused by CO2 emissions. Ad Net Zero’s mission is for immediate, collective industry action to help achieve real net-zero carbon emissions from the development, production, and media placement of advertising. As International Project Manager I am part of a team responsible for implementing and supporting new Ad Net Zero chapters. Helping each market to create structure, embed new processes, set up documentation and create marketing materials. I also attend initial chapter meetings to help the Ad Net Zero Promoter establish interactions with supporters consistent with Ad Net Zero in other markets. My responsibilities include: •	Coordinating and attending a range of meetings with the local Ad Net Zero Promoter to help establish the foundations for new Ad Net Zero chapters. •	Establishing a structure which can be used as the start point and ongoing reference for all new Ad Net Zero chapters. •	Work closely with the Ad Net Zero UK team sharing learnings, developments and programme knowledge with each Ad Net Zero chapter. •	Working with the local Ad Net Zero Promoter through their action plan working groups and with the UK Ad Net Zero team to help make local adaptations to the programme as required. •	With the Advertising Association Finance team helping oversee the administration and invoicing of any fees paid by local chapters. •	Coordinating with Ad Net Zero UK team on extra services requested by local chapters, such as company carbon data collection under Action 1. •	Helping facilitate conversations with local Ad Net Zero Promoters and AdGreen, isla, ChangeTheBrief etc. •	Being the ongoing support for local chapters. •	Helping coordinate the Global Leadership Media Working Group. The ambition of this group is to establish and standardise a data framework for the measuring carbon emissions from media. Show less

experiences.title: AV Associate Director & Green Team Chair
experiences.description: In charge of planning and buying AV channel investment across a number of clients including, McDonalds, BSH, and Activision. Previously included Disney. Responsible for the management of a team of 4 AV specialists at Manager and Buyer levels. Leading the team to consistently deliver on investment targets across TV, radio, cinema and video-on-demand. Founder and leader of the OMD UK Sustainability Team and Founder and Co-Chair of the OMG Green Team. Key Achievements - Currently directing and have previously directed climate/sustainability focused AV campaigns including Bosch i-Dos Washing Machines, Like A Bosch, and McDonald’s Trust Stories. - Created, launched, and internally promoted the OMD UK Sustainability Team. This now has 17 members including board level representation. - Chair of the Cross Agency OMG Green Team tasked with creating and implementing a road map to achieve Net Zero by 2030. - Formerly the OMD UK representative for the IPA Climate Charter Action Working Group. - My role as Sustainability Champion also includes being the OMD UK expert on internal and group wide sustainability initiatives and being available to help with pitches and client targets specifically around sustainability and environmental initiatives. - Nominated for 'Talent - Best Contribution to Cinema' at the DCM 2022 Cinema Awards. - Ensured successful delivery of client PRF’s alongside business objectives across an array of AV campaigns. To date every client has paid out our PRFs in full on audits I have been involved with, including McDonald's, Activision, Disney, and BSH. - Organised sustainability consultant Jeremy Mathieu to present to the whole of OMD UK on why we need to act on the climate crisis now, and on the important role the media industry plays in this. - Delivered numerous marketplace and media inductions to OMD UK employees of various levels. - Key member of the team winning the 'Thinkbox 2022 Best TV Ad Planning' award - for McDelivery. Show less

experiences.title: Investment Manager
experiences.description: Promoted to Manager due to consistently positive client and department feedback. Led the Disney and Activision AV team with one executive directly reporting into me, and myself reporting directly into the Deputy Head of AV. Key Achievements; - Lead AV planner/buyer for campaigns such as Avengers Infinity War 			(biggest UK cinema release of 2018 with £71m box office gross), Mary 			Poppins Returns, and Call of Duty Black Ops 4. - Capable and experienced media planner and buyer across several media 		channels including; TV, Cinema, BVOD, Radio, and Digital audio. - Helped direct and present Audio and TV Media Market updates 			to a room of c.15 Disney senior clients Show less

experiences.title: Investment Buyer
experiences.description: Promoted after completing the graduate scheme. Role expanded as an AV Specialist within the planning and buying team. Planned and bought campaigns across TV, VOD, Radio, and Cinema. Key Achievements; - Chosen to organise and present the company meeting in front of c.350 	   employees due to confident presenting skills. - Achieved successful audits across SSE, easyJet and Weight Watchers.

experiences.title: Investment Graduate
experiences.description: This role firstly included learning about the Media Industry in general across all aspects of the business. Supporting the planners and buyers on the following accounts; Channel 4, easyJet, SSE, and Hankook.
